pageContext.name: Ragnar Blackmane
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are excited to present the Ragnar Blackmane 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  Supremely confident and eager to always be first into the fray, Wolf Lord Ragnar Blackmane leads his Great Company in devastating planetary invasions. No longer as headstrong as in his youth, Ragnar's berserk rages are still furious hurricanes of violence, and his terrifying howls freeze the blood of his foes.  This fully articulated 1:18 scale Ragnar Blackmane figure includes interchangeable hands and weapon accessories and stands about 5' tall.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Warhammer 40k video game collection today!
